'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"\/atom.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=0F3XOVgphCC4QVMx5i1cD2Uxz2weexiT.rn3mnFagZg-1773309060-1.0.1.1-zFuXy2wGDzR9n8zQjewsa9tgah3g7VlIwefCFLKJDsA"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
